LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MARK EDWARD HILL'S MOTION FOR VOLUNTARY DISMISSAL IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) PRIOR TO THE HEARING, MOVING DEFENDANT SHALL LODGE BY EMAIL TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING THE ABOVE VERBATIM. NO PROPOSED ORDER RECEIVED. MOVING DEFENDANTS FAILED TO PROVIDE AND FOLLOW THE COURT'S ORDER. COUNSEL FOR THE MOVING DEFENDANTS IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST DROP A HARD COURTESY COPY IN DEPT. 302'S INBOX. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

Motion For Voluntary Dismissal
Off Calendar Jun-11-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Mark Edward Hill's Motion For Voluntary Dismissal is DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.

(see word minutes for full details)

Prior to the hearing, Moving Defendant shall lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org a proposed order repeating the above verbatim.

No proposed order received. Moving Defendants failed to provide and follow the court's order.

Counsel for the Moving Defendants is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
